plugins.name: bkit
plugins.description: Vibecoding Kit - PDCA methodology + Sprint Management (v2.1.13 GA) + CTO-Led Agent Teams + Living Context System + 43 PM frameworks + Interactive Checkpoints for AI-native development. v2.1.14 differentiation release adds Memory Enforcer (#1), Layer 6 Defense (#2), Sequential Dispatch (#3), Effort-aware (#4), PostToolUse continueOnBlock (#5), Heredoc-bypass guard (#6). 44 Skills, 34 Agents, 53 Scripts, 174 Lib Modules (20 subdirs, Clean Architecture 4-Layer, 8 Port↔Adapter pairs), 21 Hook Events, 39 Templates (incl. 7 Sprint Templates), 4 Output Styles, 2 MCP Servers (19 tools), 10 ADR invariants.
